caption: The video features a person performing on stage, likely at a musical event or concert. The individual is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. They are dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery and a red pendant featuring a black design. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The audience, visible in the foreground, appears engaged, with some members looking attentively towards the performer. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization hosting the performance. The atmosphere seems intimate and focused on the music being played.
